title: Dispute Between a Man and His Ba
description: The oldest known text on suicide and the meaning of life: a man argues with his own soul about whether death is preferable to living.
introduction: The oldest known text on suicide and the meaning of life: a man argues with his own soul about whether death is preferable to living.

translation.original_text: Death is before me today like the recovery of a sick man, like going forth after confinement.
